--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local function r(r)return B[r-(-911880+952366)]end for r,f in ipairs({{-553246-(-553247),1017913+-1017613};{819075-819074;-102120-(-102262)};{301899-301756,-899862+900162}})do while f[-656698+656699]<f[294673-294671]do do local r=table.insert local f=B local l=table.concat local
